Author: Kloe Fluffypaws@Balmung
Name: Dungeon Outfit Tracker
Description: Used to auto track dungeon attire sets for the glamour dresser. /dot brings up the window. After first initialization, open the glam dresser and armoire once to initiate a scan for the current attire sets in there.
Punchline: Tracks glamour dresser dungeon Attire Sets.
